plugins.name: claude-wiki
plugins.description: Karpathy-style LLM wiki. SessionEnd hook enqueues each Claude Code session; /wiki-ingest classifies queued sessions + manually-dropped inbox notes into an 8-category Obsidian vault (00_self / 01_inbox / 02_diary / 03_work / 04_life / 05_learn / 06_output / 07_archive). Ships /wiki-query, /wiki-lint, /wiki-status.
